pjmbasemod.death.title: YOU DIED
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.title: SERVER GUIDE
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.subtitle: Tactical PvP — how to get started
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.faction.title: FACTION
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.faction.desc: Pick a side in the join menu. Don't hit allies — kill foes.
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.role.title: ROLE
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.role.desc: Your role is set by the commander or deputy — not by you.
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.rank.title: RANK
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.rank.desc: XP from kills and captures. Rank unlocks gear.
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.garage.title: GARAGE
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.garage.desc: Take a vehicle at the garage. Notebook RMB on it to store.
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.warehouse.title: WAREHOUSE
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.warehouse.desc: At the quartermaster, spend team points on weapons and supplies.
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.capture.title: CAPTURE POINTS
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.capture.desc: Stand in a point's zone to take it. More allies — faster.
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.base.title: BASE ZONE
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.base.desc: Enemy base counts down to death — leave. Your base is safe.
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.comms.title: COMMS
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.comms.desc: Y — chat mode, Z — commander radio. Voice is proximity-based.
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.events.title: EVENTS
gui.pjmbasemod.welcome.events.desc: Drone raids and signal hunts appear. Take part for rewards.
menu.pjm.pause.title: GAME PAUSED
gui.pjmbasemod.radial.title: Actions
gui.pjmbasemod.skin.not_allowed: This skin is not available to your team
gui.pjmbasemod.radio.error.no_team: You must be in a configured team to use command radio

basezone.warning.title: ⚠ ENEMY BASE
basezone.warning.subtitle: Leave the base zone! Death in %s sec.
death.attack.pjm_base_zone: %1$s died inside an enemy base zone
pjmbasemod.wipe.warn.ranks: ⚠ This will reset ranks (XP) for ALL players. To confirm, repeat the same command with 'confirm' within 15 seconds.
pjmbasemod.wipe.warn.ranks_team: ⚠ This will reset ranks (XP) for team '%s'. To confirm, repeat the same command with 'confirm' within 15 seconds.
pjmbasemod.wipe.warn.all: ⚠ FULL WIPE: all player progress will be erased (ranks, warehouse, garages, fleet, frontline, factions, roles). Admin setup is preserved. Repeat with 'confirm' within 15 seconds.
pjmbasemod.wipe.expired: No pending confirmation, or it expired. Run the command again.
